name: Bull Rush
desc: Dash forward and attack with knockback.

name: Dash2
desc: Dash forward and attack with knockback. Repeat this if you hit something.

name: Spin
desc: Attack everything around you 3 times.

name: Spin2
desc: Attack everything around you in a wide area 3 times.

name: Fire Punch
desc: A melee attack that inflicts Burn 3.

name: FirePunch2
desc: A melee attack that inflicts more Burn the more [img:str] you have.

name: Ice Punch
desc: A melee attack that inflicts Freeze.

name: IcePunch2
desc: A much stronger melee attack that inflicts Freeze.

name: Thunder Punch
desc: A melee attack that has a 25% chance to inflict Stun.

name: ThunderPunch2
desc: A melee attack that inflicts Stun.

name: Fury Swipes
desc: A weak melee attack that has a chance to hit multiple times.

name: FurySwipes2
desc: A melee attack that has a chance to hit multiple times.

name: Side Slash
desc: An attack that hits a half circle around you.

name: SideSlash2
desc: An attack that hits a half circle around you and inflicts Bruise.

name: Leap
desc: Jump to an open tile within range, then inflict Bruise on all adjacent units.

name: FighterLeap2
desc: Jump to an open tile within range, then damage and inflict Bruise on all adjacent units.

name: Uppercut
desc: Punch a unit into the air, lobbing it back 3 tiles.

name: Uppercut2
desc:
Punch a unit into the air, lobbing it back 3 tiles.
Refresh your movement action.

name: Counter
desc: Counterattack all attacks until your next turn.

name: Counter
desc: Preemptively counterattack all attacks until your next turn.

name: Tail Whip
desc: An attack that hits 2 tiles in front of and behind you.

name: TailWhip2
desc: An attack that hits 4 tiles in front of and behind you.

name: Poke
desc: A melee attack that deals 1 damage.

name: Poke2
desc:
A melee attack that deals 1 damage.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Nip
desc: Inflict Bruise on a unit.

name: Nip2
desc: Deal 1 damage and inflict Bruise on a unit.

name: Push
desc: Knockback a unit 2 tiles.

name: Push2
desc: Turn an adjacent unit around and knock it back 2 tiles.

name: Falcon Punch
desc:
Charge up a mega punch.
[s:.7](This punch will be unleashed on your next turn.)[/s]
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

name: Falcon Punch
desc:
Charge up a mega dash attack.
[s:.7](This punch will be unleashed on your next turn.)[/s]
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

name: Exert
desc:
Refresh your basic attack and movement action.
Fall asleep at the end of the turn.

name: Exert
desc:
Refresh your basic attack and movement action.
Gain +2 [img:str] and +4 [img:spd] until end of turn.
Fall asleep at the end of the turn.

name: Enrage
desc: Give a unit +4 [img:str] and Confusion 2.

name: Enrage2
desc: Give a unit on any tile +4 [img:str] and Confusion 2.

name: Tumble
desc: Move one tile diagonally.

name: Tumble2
desc: Move two tiles diagonally.

name: Confront
desc: Move in front of an enemy.

name: Confront2
desc:
Move in front of an enemy.
Your next action has +30% critical chance.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Juiced
desc: Your movement range is doubled until the end of the turn.

name: Juiced2
desc: Your movement range is doubled and you get +4 [img:str] until the end of the turn.

name: Cosmic Punch
desc:
Punch a unit into SPACE!
[s:.7]They will fall back down at the end of the round.[/s]

name: CosmicPunch2
desc:
Punch a unit into SPACE!
[s:.7]They will fall back down at the end of the round.
(This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Taunt!
desc: All enemies within 3 tiles move toward you.

name: FighterTaunt2
desc: All enemies within 5 tiles move toward you.

name: Gravity Slam
desc: Jump to a tile and pull enemies toward you when you land.

name: GravitySlam2
desc:
Jump to a tile and pull enemies toward you when you land.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Berserk
desc: Gain +5 [img:str] and Bruise 5. This ability becomes Berserker Dash.

name: Berserk2
desc: Gain +7 [img:str] and Bruise 3. This ability becomes Berserker Dash+.

name: Berserker Dash
desc: A short range dash attack.

name: BerserkDash2
desc: A dash attack with infinite range.

name: Mock
desc:
Force a unit to move towards you.
RELOAD: Kill something.

name: Challenge2
desc:
Force a unit to move towards you.
RELOAD: Kill something.
Bonus Ability: Slap.

name: Slap
desc:
A weak melee attack.
RELOAD: Kill something.

name: Stoopzerk
desc:
Your [img:int] becomes 0. You can attack an extra time each turn for the rest of the battle.
This ability becomes MORE ANGRIER!!!

name: Stoopzerk2
desc:
Your [img:int] becomes 0. You can attack an extra time each turn for the rest of the battle.
This ability becomes MORE ANGRIER!!!+

name: MORE ANGRIER!!!
desc: Lose all of your mana and gain that much [img:str] until the end of the turn.

name: LastThought2
desc: Lose all of your mana and gain that much [img:str], [img:dex], and [img:spd] until the end of the turn.

name: Sleeper Hold
desc: Inflict Sleep on an adjacent unit.

name: SleeperHold2
desc: Inflict Sleep and Bruise on an adjacent unit.

name: Grapple
desc: Immobilize an adjacent unit for as long as you remain adjacent.

name: Grapple2
desc:
Immobilize an adjacent unit for as long as you remain adjacent.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Think Too Hard
desc:
Take damage equal to your [img:int].
The next spell you cast this turn is free.

name: ThinkTooHard2
desc:
Take damage equal to your [img:int], then your [img:int] becomes 0.
The next spell you cast this turn is free.

name: Zoomzerk
desc:
Your movement action becomes a dash attack.
This ability becomes Reposition.

name: Zoomzerk2
desc:
Your movement action becomes a dash attack. Restore all your mana.
This ability becomes Reposition+.

name: Reposition
desc: Move up to two tiles.

name: Reposition2
desc: Move up to two tiles.

name: Throw Weapon
desc:
Throw your weapon at a unit. The weapon breaks.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

name: Bloodzerk
desc:
Drop to 1 HP.
Damage you deal to bleeding units has Lifesteal.
This spell becomes Lacerate.

name: Bloodzerk2
desc:
Drop to 1 HP.
Damage you deal to bleeding units has Lifesteal.
This spell becomes Lacerate+.
[s:.7](This spell costs 0 mana.)[/s]

name: Lacerate
desc: A melee attack that inflicts Bleed 2.

name: Lacerate2
desc: A stronger melee attack that inflicts Bleed 2.

name: Exhausting Blow
desc:
Dash forward one tile and attack with knockback.
[s:.7](This spell's mana cost increases by 2 at the end of each of your turns.)[/s]

name: ExhaustingBlow2
desc:
Dash forward any number of tiles and attack with knockback.
[s:.7](This spell's mana cost increases by 2 at the end of each of your turns.)[/s]

name: Chaos Rampage
desc:
Take an extra turn. You have Madness 1 and Confusion 1 on that turn.
[s:.7](This spell can't be cast on extra turns.)[/s]

name: Chaos Rampage
desc:
Take an extra turn. You have Madness 1 on that turn.
[s:.7](This spell can't be cast on extra turns.)[/s]

name: Meteor Slam
desc:
Jump up to 2 tiles.
Damage, knockback, and inflict Burn 3 on the unit you land on and all adjacent units.
[s:.7](Adjacent units take half damage.)[/s]

name: MeteorSlam2
desc:
Jump up to 5 tiles.
Damage, knockback, and inflict Burn 3 on the unit you land on and all adjacent units.

name: Muscle Memory
desc:
A melee attack that deals 8 damage.
[s:.7](This spell's damage is reduced by 1 and mana cost is reduced by 2 each time it's cast.)[/s]

name: MuscleMemory2
desc:
A melee attack that deals 8 damage and inflicts Bruise.
[s:.7](This spell's damage is reduced by 1 and mana cost is reduced by 2 each time it's cast.)[/s]

name: Inhale
desc: Suck all units in a straight line 1 tile toward you.

name: Inhale2
desc: Suck all units in a straight line 3 tiles toward you.

name: One-Two Punch
desc: A melee attack that hits twice. Each punch inflicts Bruise 1.

name: OneTwoPunch2
desc: A melee attack that hits thrice! Each punch inflicts Bruise 1.

name: Synchro Spin
desc: You and each allied cat do a spin attack at the same time.

name: TeamSpin2
desc:
You and each allied cat do a spin attack at the same time.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Flex Off
desc: You and each allied cat gain +2 [img:shield] and knockback adjacent units 2 tiles.

name: TeamFlex2
desc: You and each allied cat gain +2 [img:shield], +2 temporary Brace, and knockback adjacent units 2 tiles.

name: Huddle
desc: You and each allied cat give adjacent units +1 Damage and +2 [img:spd].

name: Huddle2
desc:
You and each allied cat give adjacent units +1 Damage and +2 [img:spd].
[s:.7](This spell is free the first time it's cast each battle.)[/s]

name: Rage Punch
desc: A melee attack that increases its damage by 1 each time you take damage.

name: RagePunch2
desc:
A melee attack that increases its damage by 1 each time you take damage.
[s:.7](This spell starts at 5 damage.)[/s]

name: Breaking Point
desc:
Deal damage, knockback, and knockback damage equal to your [img:str].
Reduce this spell's mana cost by 1 each time you take damage.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

name: BreakingPoint2
desc:
Deal damage, knockback, and knockback damage equal to your [img:str].
Reduce this spell's mana cost by 2 each time you take damage.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

name: Assert Dominance
desc: A weak melee attack. If this kills anything, you become the Alpha. If you are the Alpha, this spell deals 5 additional damage and inflicts Bruise.

name: AssertDominance2
desc: A weak melee attack. If this kills anything, you become the Alpha and gain +2 [img:str]. If you are the Alpha, this spell deals 5 additional damage and inflicts Bruise.

name: 1D Chess
desc: Move toward the closest enemy. The dumber you are, the farther you move.

name: DumbMove2
desc:
Move toward the closest enemy. The dumber you are, the farther you move.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Sucker Punch
desc: The next time an enemy moves through an adjacent tile, cancel its movement and attack it.

name: SuckerPunch2
desc:
The next time an enemy moves through an adjacent tile, cancel its movement and attack it.
Bonus Passive: While it's not your turn, your basic attack inflicts Bruise 2.

name: Stick!
desc:
Equip a temporary Stick!
[s:.7](Your weapon slot must be empty.)[/s]

name: Stick2
desc:
Equip a temporary Stick! Maybe even a big one?
[s:.7](Your weapon slot must be empty.)[/s]
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Hurl
desc: Toss an adjacent unit at a random unit.

name: Hurl2
desc:
Toss an adjacent unit at a random unit.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Big Punch
desc:
A melee attack.
This spell's mana cost increases by 2 each time it's cast.

name: BigPunch2
desc:
A melee attack.
This spell's mana cost increases by 1 each time it's cast.

name: Paw Breaker
desc: A huge punch that breaks your paw... (You get -1 [img:str] permanently.)

name: Pawbreaker2
desc: A huge punch that inflicts Bruise and Stun, and breaks your paw... (You get -1 [img:str] permanently.)

name: Ram
desc: Knock back a unit 4 tiles, then dash forward and attack it.

name: Ram2
desc: Knock back a unit 10 tiles, then dash forward and attack it.
